domain: Tuvan/Mongolic ovoo sacred cairn waypoint system (rock cairns at mountain passes, crossroads, springs; travelers add stone + circle clockwise 3 times; community-curated landmark accumulating contributions; tiered landmark hierarchy by elevation/junction-type)
specific_mechanism: OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER: 3-tier spatial-landmark agent memory architecture. (1) Maintain 3 landmark tiers: T₁=high-altitude (rare-but-broad summary landmarks), T₂=crossroads (junction-routing landmarks linking sub-tasks), T₃=spring (resource-providing factual nodes). (2) Each landmark L=(key=spatial-hash(context), value=top-K curated retrieval pointers, visit_count=N). (3) Write: query deposits a 'stone' = insert pointer into nearest landmark in current tier. (4) Read: clockwise 3-pass — query each tier 3 times, accumulate retrieved evidence in working memory. (5) Tier-promotion: high-visit-count landmarks promoted T₃→T₂→T₁; low-visit-count demoted. (6) Spatial-hash via locality-sensitive embedding of recent context.
llm_application: OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER 3-tier spatial-landmark agent memory + community-curated visit-count accumulation + clockwise 3-pass retrieval. Differs from R408 ICELANDIC-CHAIN (chain-of-sagas memory). R428 WAVE-BOWL-CACHE (wave-bowl cache eviction). R442 ADINKRA-SYMBOL-LM (semiotic symbol indexing). R454 TIERED-KV-CACHE (HBM-DRAM-SSD KV persistence — closest but operates on KV cache not landmark agent memory). R470 CHILOTE-PALAFITO (stilt-house cross-tier projection). Differs from HMT NAACL 2025 (segment-level recurrence + memory embeddings — closest but no 3-pass retrieval, no community-curated visit count). ByteRover 2604.01599 (LLM-curated hierarchical context — closest, but no 3-tier high-altitude/crossroads/spring specialization). MemPalace 2604.21284 (spatial metaphor memory — closest, but no clockwise 3-pass + visit-count promotion). MemGPT (tiered context/recall/archive — partially matches but different routing). Differs by 3-TIER HIGH-ALTITUDE/CROSSROADS/SPRING LANDMARK SPECIALIZATION + COMMUNITY-CURATED VISIT-COUNT PROMOTION + CLOCKWISE 3-PASS RETRIEVAL.
novelty_claim: HMT + ByteRover + MemGPT + MemPalace cover hierarchical tiered memory paradigm. OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER adds (a) 3-tier high-altitude/crossroads/spring landmark specialization + (b) community-curated visit-count promotion/demotion + (c) clockwise 3-pass tier retrieval. Recombination — borderline lookup.
